metadata.description: Local marketplace of reusable Claude capabilities for the endorsement operations labs. Built once, installed by any analyst.

plugins.name: endorsements-handoff
plugins.description: Build the weekly Endorsements System Issues Queue handoff: pull SI-Queue cases plus incidents/dev tickets from the Salesforce and Jira demo connectors, assemble the case view, export a formatted Excel workbook, and draft the handoff email to the development and underwriting teams.

plugins.name: endorsement-sla-analytics
plugins.description: Cycle-time & SLA analytics: days-to-close by LOB and source vs SLA targets, and open defects ranked by blocked cases and blocked written premium ($ at risk). Reuses the Salesforce + Jira demo connectors.
